network_summary: Dr. Mohammed S. Sayeed DDS (BDS India 1996, DDS UIC 2002) is the operating dentist-owner of three Chicago GP locations all branded as 'Hana Dental Center'. The NPPES legal entity on all three is 'DR. IMTIAZ AHMED, PC' — a professional corporation under which Sayeed practices; Imtiaz Ahmed appears to be a legacy/historical PC name (prior owner or original registrant). Sayeed is the authorized official across all three NPIs and is personally listed on dental directories as the provider at these addresses. No MSO, management company, DSO affiliation, or private equity backing was found. This is a private dentist-owned multi-location group with no separate platform/management layer.
